Items.Title: 自动生成 OpenAPI——网络不会说谎！ | Auto OpenAPI Generation — The Network Doesn’t Lie!
Items.Description:
哈里什·纳塔拉吉

发表于然而，大多数组织无法回答以下关键问题：

  • 我有哪些 API？
  • 是否记录和维护 API 的OpenAPI 模式？
  • 哪些 API 处理敏感数据？
  • 哪些用户在哪些角色（或范围）下访问哪些 API？
  • 哪些 API 是外部的还是内部的？

基于注释的 OpenAPI 生成不可扩展

不同的开源工具集

有大量（特定于语言/框架的）开源工具在构建时通过扫描源代码生成 OpenAPI 规范。

他们使用开发人员添加到语言/框架特定资源、方法和控制器的代码级注释来为 API 生成模式。

这些工具不能很好地扩展

现代开发环境本质上是多语言的，您可以在其中找到几个小团队，使用各种技术堆栈和不同的编程语言。

由于以下原因，这些工具在这些环境中不能很好地扩展：

  • 在如此多的小团队、不同的编程语言和各种语言框架之间，很难实现（API 文档的）一致性。
  • 开发者需要在适当的地方正确注释代码，以免文档不完整和不准确。
  • 开发人员在不断重构代码时需要维护注释，以免文档不完整和不准确。
  • 注释本质上是静态的。 当 API 返回动态对象时，自动记录的规范将不正确或不完整。
  • 无法保证自动记录的内容是 API 展示的实际连线行为。

网络不会说谎

这使得网络成为 API 行为和模式的最终真实来源。

直到最近，以一致且可扩展的方式利用网络来自动发现和自动记录 API 一直是个挑战。

基于 eBPF 的自动 OpenAPI 生成

实现一致性和可扩展性，同时保护隐私

无摩擦且保护隐私的 API 可观察性

安装涉及 Kubernetes 的单个Helm Chart ，或其他环境的单个Docker 命令。 安装不需要对您的应用程序进行代码更改、配置更改或 SDK 添加。

确保客户数据的隐私至关重要。 您可以在此处阅读有关隐私保护功能的更多信息。

使用敏感数据注释自动生成 OpenAPI

运行时环境中的所有活动 API 都会被自动发现，并且 OpenAPI 规范会自动为它们生成。

自动生成的 OpenAPI 规范

持续验证现有 OpenAPI 文档

使用API-First方法构建 API 文档的团队也可以从中受益。

使用自动生成的文档交叉验证现有 OpenAPI 文档的准确性和完整性。

有兴趣尝试 Auto OpenAPI Generation？



原文:

Harish Nataraj

Posted on Jun 14

Visibility of APIs is a fundamental necessity for governance, security, and productivity. Yet most organizations are unable to answer the following critical questions:

  • What APIs do I have?
  • Are OpenAPI schemas for the APIs documented and maintained?
  • Which APIs process sensitive data?
  • Which users access which APIs, under what roles (or scopes)?
  • Which APIs are external vs. internal?

Annotation Based OpenAPI Generation Is Not Scalable

Disparate Set of Open Source Tools

There are a plethora of (language/framework specific) open source tools that generate OpenAPI specifications at build time, by scanning source code.

They use code level annotations added by developers, to language/framework specific resources, methods, and controllers, to generate schema for APIs.

Examples include Swagger-Core, SpringFox, NSwag / Swashbuckle, Swagger-express / HAPI-Swagger, Django-REST-Swagger / Flask-RESTplus, etc.

These Tools Don’t Scale Well

Modern development environments are polyglot in nature, where you find several small teams, using a variety of technology stacks, and disparate programming languages.

These tools don’t scale well in these environments due to the following reasons:

  • It is hard to achieve consistency (of API documentation) across so many small teams, disparate programming languages, and variety of language frameworks.
  • Developers need to correctly annotate the code in appropriate places, lest the documentation will be incomplete and inaccurate.
  • Developers need to maintain the annotations as they continuously refactor code, lest the documentation will be incomplete and inaccurate.
  • Annotations are static in nature. When APIs return dynamic objects, the auto documented specification will be incorrect, or incomplete.
  • There is no guarantee that what is auto documented, is the actual wire behavior exhibited by the API.

The Network Doesn’t Lie

APIs transact by exchanging JSON data over the network. This makes the network, the ultimate source of truth for API behavior, and schema.

Harnessing the network to auto discover & auto document APIs, in a consistent and scalable manner, has been challenging until recently.

eBPF Based Automatic OpenAPI Generation

Achieve Consistency & Scale, while Preserving Privacy

eBPF is revolutionary technology, that enables auto documentation of APIs in a consistent, scalable, and language/framework agnostic manner.

Levo provides a free service that automatically generates OpenAPI documentation for all your APIs, by passively observing your runtime API traffic via eBPF.

The installation involves a single Helm Chart for Kubernetes, or a single Docker command for other environments. The installation does not require code changes, configuration changes, or SDK additions to your applications.

Ensuring the privacy of your customer data is paramount. You can read more about privacy-preserving features here.

Auto Generate OpenAPI with Sensitive Data Annotations

All APIs active in the runtime environments are auto discovered, and OpenAPI specifications are auto generated for them.

OpenAPI specifications are annotated with sensitive data types (PII, PSI, PHI, etc).

The API documentation is always fresh, and is based on the single source of truth, which is the actual API behavior observed on the network.

Continuously Validate Existing OpenAPI Documentation

Teams building API documentation with an API-First approach, can also benefit.

Cross validate existing OpenAPI documentation with auto generated documentation for accuracy and completeness.

Interested in trying Auto OpenAPI Generation?

Levo is a purpose-built, developer-first API security solution that fully automates API Observability, API Documentation & API Testing in CI/CD pipelines.

Signup for a forever free account, and start auto documenting all your APIs within minutes.

Have questions? Contact us at info@levo.ai.

Ashique Billa Molla - Jun 5
Items.Author: hnataraj

Items.Title: 反应原生：相机未激活 | React native: Camera is not active
Items.Description:
我正在为 react-native 开发我的库。 我需要使用相机。
我发现了不错的包react-native-camera-kit和react-native-vision-camera
我使用 create-react-native-library ( https://github.com/callstack/react-native-builder-bob ) 创建了我的库

将react-native-camera-kit添加到devDependencies和peerDependencies 。 向我的应用添加并配置react-native-camera-kit

当我在我的应用程序中使用 react-native-camera-kit 时，一切正常。 我在我的库中使用 react-native-camera-kit 创建了组件并将其导出。

当我尝试使用此组件时出现错误相机已关闭

再次。 直接在应用程序内使用react-native-camera-kit - 好的。 通过我的库使用react-native-camera-kit - 错误

也许有人知道该怎么做。
谢谢

大卫塞拉诺卡纳莱斯 - Apr 16 4月16日



原文:

I'm developing my library for react-native. I need to use camera.
I found nice packages react-native-camera-kit and react-native-vision-camera
I created my lib using create-react-native-library (https://github.com/callstack/react-native-builder-bob)

Added react-native-camera-kit to devDependencies and peerDependencies. Added and configured react-native-camera-kit to my app

When I'm using react-native-camera-kit inside my app everything is ok. I created component with react-native-camera-kit inside my lib and export it.

When I'm trying to use this component I'm getting an error Camera is closed

Again. Using react-native-camera-kit directly inside app - OK. Using react-native-camera-kit through my lib - Error

Maybe somebody knows what to do.
Thanks

David Serrano Canales - Apr 16
Items.Author: ntf23

Items.Title: AWS S3 安全性 | AWS S3 Security
Items.Description:
默认情况下，所有存储桶和对象都是私有的。 只有资源所有者（即创建它的 AWS 账户）才能访问该资源。

可以通过以下方式控制对 S3 存储桶和/或对象的访问

  1. 桶策略
  2. 访问控制列表

桶策略

存储桶策略附加到 S3 存储桶并定义允许或拒绝谁

什么时候用什么？

有关 AWS 的更多此类简单说明，请关注我

领英： https ://www.linkedin.com/in/venkatesh111/

推特： https ://twitter.com/venkatesh111

鲁斯兰·艾哈迈齐亚诺夫—— Jun 14 6月14日



原文:

All Buckets and objects are private by default. Only the resource owner, an AWS account that created it, can access the resource.

Access to S3 bucket and/or objects can be controlled via

  1. IAM Policies
  2. Bucket Polices
  3. Access Control Lists

IAM Policies, Bucket Polices, & ACL

IAM Policies Vs. Bucket Polices

IAM Policies are attached to IAM Entities such as User, Groups and Roles and they define What is allowed or denied ?

Bucket Polices are attached to S3 Buckets and define Who is allowed or denied

AWS S3 Block Public Access Block Public Access is applicable to only Public/Anonymous access Block public access settings can override ACLs and bucket policies public access You can apply block public access settings to individual buckets or to all buckets in your account

When to use What ?

AWS References:

https://aws.amazon.com/s3/security/

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/s3-access-control.html

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/using-iam-policies.html

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/acls.html

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/access-control-block-public-access.html

For More such simple notes on AWS, Follow me on

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/venkatesh111/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/venkatesh111

GitHub: https://venkateshk111.github.io/

Ruslan Akhmetzianov - Jun 14

Items.Title: 克里皮奥 | Klippyo
Items.Description:
用户可以从他们的移动设备创建视频，并在他们舒适的手掌上编辑、发布和分享所有内容。

如果您的客户更喜欢在他们的笔记本电脑/PC 上制作视频，那没问题。 不仅如此，如果您的用户不想拍摄任何视频，他们还可以利用庞大的视频资源库来创建自己的视频。

视频内容现在以完全不同的方式主导社交媒体。 意识到这一点的人们正在创建非常受欢迎的频道，拥有更多的粉丝和订阅者，这比看起来公平的要多！

但这只是因为人们认为内容创建很容易，而事实并非如此。 拍摄、编辑和发布新鲜内容是一项复杂且耗时的任务。 要引起注意是一场持续的斗争。 因此，那些努力获得关注的人应该得到所有的粉丝、所有的赞誉以及他们因此获得的所有销售额。

问题是视频已经发生了很大的变化，以至于许多人完全没有得到任何牵引力。 这不是因为缺乏努力，或者糟糕的内容，或者你通常会想到的任何原因。 你可以拥有世界上最好的内容，但它仍然不会被看到。

这完全是因为视频的使用方式不同。 好消息是，一旦您知道有什么不同，做出改变并获得回报就很容易了。 结果可能是惊人的：

参与度提高 80-100%。 视频观看次数增加 30-35%。 每次参与的成本降低 33%。 新闻源中的可见性提高 78%。

真正的好消息是，刚刚推出了一款名为 Klippyo 的新应用程序，任何人都可以毫不费力地进行这些更改。 这是一个可靠的应用程序，由与索尼、特斯拉和沃达丰等品牌合作过的团队创建。

它甚至被 Derral 自己使用。 在顶部，添加表情符号、图形、图像甚至字幕。 这是视频创作的未来。

用简单的 3 个步骤创建具有高度吸引力的视频的更快、最简单和最智能的方法：

第一步：挑选。 射击。 进口

第 2 步：自定义

第 3 步：发布

报价页面上有更多详细信息，Klippyo 绝对值得您花时间。 如果没有其他原因，只是想看看发生了什么变化以及您需要对视频做些什么才能从现在开始取得成功。 立即获取。

使用 Klippyo，您可以在几秒钟内轻松地 meme'ify 您的视频！ 在几秒钟内添加表情符号、文本、报价和更多内容：想为您的视频添加一点额外的活力吗？ 只需点击几个按钮，即可轻松快速地添加表情符号、文本、绘图甚至流行语录。 无需复杂的软件，一切都在您的手掌中发生。 添加 1 Tap 动画简介和结尾：Klippyo 允许用户为您的视频添加完全可定制的简介和结尾！ 想要在视频开头播放时髦的文字？ 需要在视频末尾显示您的社交链接？ 没问题。 需要方形或矩形视频？ 您在几秒钟内就搞定了：在点击性能和盈利能力方面，垂直和方形视频已经多次证明了它们的重要性！ 问题是，手动执行此操作是有问题且耗时的。 不再。 自动字幕：统计证明，带字幕的视频具有更高的参与度和保留率。 值得庆幸的是，使用 Klippyo 添加字幕只需点击 1 个按钮，就像魔术一样，Klippyo 可以在几分钟内为您的视频添加字幕！ 或者，您也可以上传您的字幕文件。 拍摄、编辑和点击发布：完成您的视频了吗？ 好的。 无需渲染大量视频文件。 只需点击“发布”并将您的视频发布到您想要的任何社交网络……以您想要的任何分辨率或比例！ 没有自己的视频？ 没问题：Klippyo 与 Viddyoze Stock 完全集成，让用户可以访问数以千计的库存视频剪辑来创建他们的视频！ 无需拍摄任何东西！ 只需从我们庞大的库存库中挑选一个专业视频，自定义并制作您自己的视频，然后在完成后发布！

非凡的客户支持。 桌面软件绑定到您的计算机？ 这意味着您可以在几分钟内随时随地拍摄视频、编辑它们并发布到任何社交网络，而无需昂贵的桌面软件。

社交视频模因可从任何平台上的移动新闻源中产生惊人的效果。 多个纵横比。 以适合您的内容、平台或设备的任何宽高比进行拍摄、编辑和发布。 专为移动设备打造的专业编辑套件，让您可以随时随地制作精彩的社交视频。 直接社交媒体整合：直接分享到您最喜欢的社交平台。 表情符号和贴纸：鼓励喜欢、分享和许多其他反应，以将更多人带入您的社交影响范围。 介绍和结尾：可定制的介绍和结尾，以吸引注意力，创建简单的品牌，并通过直接号召采取行动来激发行动。 字幕：提高观众的留存率，并与听障人士、安静环境中的人以及 85% 关闭声音观看视频的 Facebook 用户互动。 引语：引语像其他任何东西一样病毒式传播，Klippyo 让您可以快速轻松地找到引语并直接从您的手机发布。

查看 Klippyo



原文:

KLIPPYO WHAT IS IT
lippyo is a web based video creator that allows users to create high quality, engaging video content in just a few minutes. Users can create videos from their mobile device, and edit, publish & share all from the comfort of their palm.

lf your customers prefer making videos on their laptop/PC, no problem. Klippyo is 100% cloud based, allowing users to create from anywhere. Not only that, but if your users do not want to shoot any video, they have the ability to tap into a massive library of video assets to create their.

Video content is now dominating social media in a completely different way. And the people who’ve realised this are creating hugely popular channels with more fans and subscribers than seems fair!

But that’s only because people think content creation is easy, and it’s not. Shooting, editing, and publishing fresh content is a complex, time-consuming task. It’s a constant struggle to get noticed. So the people that put in the effort to get noticed deserve all the fans, all the accolades, and all the sales they get as a result.

The problem is video has changed so much that many people are completely failing to get any traction at all. And it’s not because of a lack of effort, or bad content, or any reason you’d typically think of. You could have the best content in the world, and it’ll still not get seen.

And it’s all because of the different way video is being used. The good news is once you know what’s so different, making the change and reaping the rewards is easy. And the results can be stunning:

80-100% more engagement. 30-35% higher video views. 33% less cost per engagement. 78% more visibility in newsfeeds.

And the really good news is that there’s a new application that’s just launched called Klippyo that lets anyone make these changes with next no effort at all. This is a solid app, created by a team who’ve worked with brands like Sony, Tesla, and Vodaphone.

Klippyo is helping everyday content creators create video that’s proven to be more engaging, capable of generating cheaper clicks and making your brand 78% more visible on the news feed. It’s even used by Derral himself. Klippyo also features the ability to add intros & outros (straight from Viddyoze), lower thirds & overlays with just a click of a mouse. On top, add emojis, graphics, images & even captions. Klippyo features truly endless amounts of customization for your users video content. This is the future of video creation.

The Faster, Easiest & Smartest Way To Create Highly Engaging Videos with easy 3 steps:

Step 1: Pick. Shoot. Import

Step 2: Customize

Step 3: Publish

There’s a ton more detail on the offer page, and Klippyo is definitely worth your time. If for no other reason than to see what’s changed and what you need to be doing with your videos to succeed from here on out. Get It Now.

KLIPPYO FEATURES Meme Your Video In Just 1 Tap: Video memes aren’t just the trendy new thing to do… they are proven to increase clicks, conversions and engagement! With Klippyo, you can easily meme’ify your video in seconds! Add Emojis, Text, Quotes & More In Seconds: Want to add a little extra zing to your videos? Easily and quickly add emojis, text, drawings or even popular quotes by simply tapping a few buttons. No complex software necessary, everything happens from the palm of your hand. Add 1 Tap Animated Intros & Outros: Klippyo allows users to add fully customisable intros & outros to your videos! Want a funky text call out at the beginning of your video? Need to show your social links at the end of your video? No problemo. Viddyoze Integration: Connect to Klippyo on a web browser & import your videos directly to your Klippyo creations! Need A Square Or Rectangular Video? You’ve Got It In Seconds: Vertical & square videos have proven their weight in gold many times over when it comes to click performance & profitability! The problem is, doing this manually is problematic and time consuming. Not anymore. Klippyo taps the problem away with just 1 prod of your finger. Automatic Captions: It’s been statistically proven that captioned videos have much higher engagement and retention rates. Thankfully, adding captions with Klippyo is just a case of tapping 1 button, and like magic, Klippyo can add captions to your video in minutes! Alternatively, you can upload your on caption files too. Shoot, Edit & Tap To Publish: Finished your video? Good. No need to render extensive video files. Simply hit “Publish” and post your video to any social network you desire… in any resolution or ratio you want! Don’t Have Your Own Video? No Problem: Klippyo is fully integrated with Viddyoze Stock, giving users access to thousands of stock video clips to create their videos from! No need to shoot anything! Simply pick a professional video from our massive stock library, customize and make it your own, then publish when you’re done!

100% Cloud Based. Phenomenal Customer Support. Desktop software tied to your computer? Klippyo works on any web browser on any portable device! That means you can shoot videos on the go, edit them, and publish to any social network all within minutes, without the need of expensive desktop software.

**WHAT KLIPPYO CAN DO FOR YOU **Square videos give you 78% more screen real-estate, increase views, engagement, and reduce your cost per engagement on mobile platforms. Social video memes produce stunning results from mobile newsfeeds on any platform. Multiple aspect ratios. Shoot, edit and publish in any aspect ratio that suits your content, platform, or device. Professional editing suite purpose-built for mobile so you can create incredible social videos on the go. Direct social media integration: Share straight to your favourite social platforms. Emojis and Stickers: encourage likes, shares, and many other reactions to bring more people into your social sphere of influence. Intros and Outros: customizable intros and outros to grab attention, create easy branding, and inspire action with direct calls to action. Intros and Outros Pro: Integrate your Viddyoze account to bring world-class video animations to your Klippyo content. Captions: boost viewer retention and interact with the hearing impaired, people in quiet environments, and the 85% of Facebook users who watch videos with the sound off. Captions Pro as an entirely optional extra, the team at Klippyo will create and sync pro-level captions for your video, for a small fee. Quotes: quotes go viral like nothing else, and Klippyo makes it fast and easy to find a quote and publish it directly from your phone.

Check out The Klippyo
